emails.subject: RACCOON IN MY ATTIC RIGHT NOW
emails.body: Help. There is a raccoon in my attic and I can hear it scratching at 5am. Wife is freaking out. Address is 4500 Brainerd Rd. Can you come TODAY. Please. Will pay extra.

emails.subject: snake in garage HELP
emails.body: there is a snake in my garage. it is black with some pattern, idk. i screamed and slammed the door. how fast can you get here. 22 hilltop ln hixson

emails.subject: URGENT - rats in dry storage
emails.body: Skye - Tony at Lookout Grille. Found rat droppings in dry storage this morning. Health inspector comes Thursday. Need this handled today or tomorrow morning at latest. Call me 423-555-0199.

emails.subject: Something died in our wall
emails.body: Hey Skye, it's Felicia from Crestwood. Something has clearly died inside our wall (master bedroom, north side). The smell is unbearable. Tom says it's been there a few days but I can't take it anymore. Can you come this week?

emails.subject: Skunk on the loading dock
emails.body: Skye — Marcus at Solo Cup Brewing. Skunk has made a home under our loading dock. Sprayed twice this week. The smell is in our beer warehouse. URGENT. Quote me whatever. Just fix it.

emails.subject: Skye dear, possum under the porch again
emails.body: Skye honey, it's Dottie. That same possum (or maybe his cousin) is back under the porch. He was there last June, your daddy got him out. Whenever you have a chance, no rush. I'll have lemonade ready. - Dottie

emails.subject: Quote for bat removal
emails.body: Hi, we have bats in our attic in our home in East Brainerd. Looks like maybe 5-6 of them when we shined a flashlight up there. Two-story house, attic accessible from a pulldown ladder. Looking for a quote and timeline. Thanks, Jen

emails.subject: estimate for squirrels?
emails.body: How much to remove squirrels from soffit? Heard them scratching for 2 weeks. Ranch house, 1500 sq ft, Soddy-Daisy.

emails.subject: Inquiry — armadillo damage in yard
emails.body: Hello, we've had armadillos digging up our backyard for about 3 weeks now. Lots of holes in the lawn. Can you provide a quote for removal and also any repair work? We're in Hixson near the country club. Thanks, Ravi & Anjali Patel

emails.subject: Commercial quote — 8-unit apartment building
emails.body: Hi Possum Patrol team, I manage a small apartment building in Red Bank. Tenants have been complaining about mice. Looking for an inspection + treatment plan. Possibly recurring monthly. Building has 8 units, mostly 1BR. Please let me know your rates and availability. - Brent

emails.subject: how much for opossum
emails.body: hi how much to take an opossum out from under a shed. small shed. just one possum we think

emails.subject: Pest inspection quote — school facilities
emails.body: Good afternoon, We are reviewing our pest control vendor and would like to request a quote for monthly inspection services for our K-8 campus. Approximately 45,000 sq ft across 3 buildings, plus cafeteria. Please send service offerings and pricing. Thank you, Linda Edwards, Facilities Director

emails.subject: Re: Quick question about your Google rankings
emails.body: Hi there, I noticed Possum Patrol is ranking on page 2 for 'pest control Chattanooga'. We've helped 47+ pest control companies move to page 1 in 90 days. Worth a 15-min chat? — Tyler

emails.subject: Reduce your credit card processing fees by 38%
emails.body: Skye, We've helped local service businesses just like yours save $400-$1,200/month on payment processing. Would you have 10 minutes this week to see if you qualify?

emails.subject: 💼 [FREE] AI Tools for Pest Control Pros
emails.body: Discover the 7 AI tools every modern pest control business is using in 2026. Free PDF: just click here ===> [link]

emails.subject: Verified leads in your area - $19 each
emails.body: Hot leads for pest control jobs in Chattanooga and Hamilton County. Real homeowners actively looking. First 10 leads free for new customers. Reply YES to start.

emails.subject: Stop losing leads — try our pest control CRM
emails.body: Our pest-control-specific CRM has helped 800+ small operators double their close rate. Free 14-day trial. Schedule a demo: [link]

emails.subject: Wrap your truck for under $1,800 this month
emails.body: Premium vinyl truck wraps. Lifetime warranty. Free design consultation. Local Chattanooga shop. Quote in 24hr.

emails.subject: Your trap order is ready for pickup
emails.body: Skye, your order from last Friday is ready. 6x Tomahawk 608SS, 4x Havahart medium, the cones you asked for. Stop by anytime before 5. Don't forget you still have an open invoice from April ($1,247.50).

emails.subject: Policy renewal notice - Action required
emails.body: Hi Skye, your commercial liability policy renews on Feb 28, 2027. Premium has increased by 7% over last year. Please contact our office to review or request quotes. Tom

emails.subject: Truck oil change reminder
emails.body: Skye - it's been 5,000 miles since your last service on the F-150. Stop by when you can. Bobby.

emails.subject: Your monthly statement is ready
emails.body: Your April 2026 QuickBooks Online statement is now available. Log in to view your activity.

emails.subject: Quarterly inspection scheduling — River Oaks
emails.body: Hi Skye, time for our spring quarterly. Board would like to schedule for the last week of May if possible. Please confirm date and ETA. - Linda

emails.subject: Question about pre-listing inspection
emails.body: Skye hi! I have a listing going live next week and the sellers want a pre-inspection. Standard residential, 2200 sqft, Lookout Mountain. Can you get out there by Friday? Also — do you have any updated rates? I want to be able to refer you confidently. Thanks! - Marsha

emails.subject: Thank you and a small question
emails.body: Dear Skye, Mary and I want to thank you again for the quick response last week with the bird in the sanctuary. We had a wonderful Sunday service uninterrupted. Mary will mail the check this week. One small follow-up question — do you do gutter cleaning at all, or could you recommend someone? Blessings, Pastor Jim

emails.subject: Referral — friend with a bird issue
emails.body: Hey Skye, I sent your info to a friend of mine, Cara Whitmer, who has a starling family nesting in her dryer vent. She'll be reaching out. Also, our monthly inspection is overdue — I think we missed last month. Can we reschedule? - Wendy

emails.subject: Question about my invoice
emails.body: Hi Skye, my invoice from last week shows $425 but Marshall had quoted me $350 in February when we first talked. Was the pricing increased? Just want to make sure there isn't a mistake. Thanks, Susan

emails.subject: Re: Re: rats came back
emails.body: Hey Skye - just an update. The rats are back. The bait stations might need refilling? I emailed you 2 weeks ago about this and didn't hear back. Should we set up another visit?

emails.subject: Need to reschedule Thursday
emails.body: Skye - can we move my Thursday appointment to Friday? Got called into work. Same time works. Sorry!

emails.subject: Complaint
emails.body: I had service on April 22. The technician (Skye? I think it was you?) was professional but the raccoon issue has NOT been resolved — I am still hearing scratching. Per your guarantee, I'd like a re-treatment at no additional charge. Please advise.

emails.subject: Reconsider
emails.body: Look. I know your dad and I had a falling out in 2019. I've changed. I have a real issue — a possum has gotten into my crawlspace and I can't find anyone else who'll come out. I'll pay double if you can come this week. - Mike Poteet

emails.subject: Possum Patrol — Bar Mitzvah May 30?
emails.body: Hi! I emailed back in January but I want to follow up. My nephew Jacob's bar mitzvah is May 30 at the Westin downtown. I know your band Possum Patrol is local. Are you available for a 90-min set? We'd want a mix of rock and Jewish standards. Budget is $1,800. Please let me know! - Garth

emails.subject: Raccoons stole my crypto wallet (URGENT)
emails.body: I need someone to come investigate a serious situation. Raccoons broke into my detached garage Tuesday night. My hardware wallet (Ledger) was in a drawer with $47,000 in BTC and ETH on it. The wallet is gone. I have footage from my Ring camera but can't tell where they took it. I think they buried it in my yard. I need someone with experience tracking raccoon dens. PLEASE CALL ASAP. This is time-sensitive.

emails.subject: Skye thank you
emails.body: Just wanted to send a quick thank-you for handling the bat situation last week. So professional and Marshall would be proud. We're recommending you to all our neighbors. - Viv

emails.subject: I know Marshall is gone but...
emails.body: Skye dear, I know your father is retired and I shouldn't be writing him, but he was such a comfort when my husband passed. I have squirrels in the eaves and I'd like to schedule with you. He spoke so highly of you. Whenever you have time. - Eleanor

emails.subject: Quote — yellow jackets in deck
emails.body: Hi - need a quote for yellow jacket nest removal. Looks like they built it in the underside of my deck. Maybe 200-300 of them I can see. Address 5 Watercrest Dr Chattanooga. How much and how soon? -Aiden

emails.subject: found your business card at the diner
emails.body: hey saw your card at the cracker barrel on hwy 153. i have a mouse problem in a rental property im managing. small 2bdrm. can you ballpark a price? thanks

emails.subject: RFQ - quarterly commercial pest control
emails.body: Possum Patrol team, We are accepting bids for our quarterly pest control contract for the 2026-2027 cycle. Property is 6 buildings, 110,000 sq ft total. Current vendor's contract ends July 31. Please submit your proposal by June 15. Specs attached (well, they would be — Skye this email had a PDF Marshall wouldn't have known how to open). - Sandra Gellman, Property Admin

emails.subject: Quick question on flying squirrels
emails.body: Hi, do you all handle flying squirrels? I think that's what's in my attic. They glide between trees in my yard. Different price than regular squirrels?

emails.subject: Following up on my March visit
emails.body: Hey Skye, you came out in March for the chipmunks under the deck. They're back. I think we need exclusion work — you mentioned that as an option last time. Can we set something up?

emails.subject: Re: Re: Re: schedule for May
emails.body: Skye - last email I sent was a week ago. Are you still in business? Please get back to me. We had an agreement that you'd come out the second week of May for the spring inspection and I haven't heard a thing. - Tabby Greene

emails.subject: Free estimate?
emails.body: do u do free estimates? heard from my buddy mike (mike poteet) that you might be hiring? whats the rate

emails.subject: Demo follow-up
emails.body: Skye, following up from our call last month. Ready to talk through next steps on ServiceTitan for Possum Patrol?

emails.subject: Annual membership dues — final notice
emails.body: Possum Patrol Pest Control - your annual Chamber of Commerce membership dues ($375) are 90 days overdue. Please remit by May 31 to avoid lapse. - Chamber Membership Services

emails.subject: Ants
emails.body: Hi! Long-time customer. We have ants in the kitchen. Black ones. I think regular ant spray isn't cutting it. Can you come by sometime this week?

emails.subject: Service question
emails.body: Hi I'd been a customer once last year. Wondering if you offer mosquito treatment for backyards. We're having an outdoor party May 25 and the yard is unusable. Quote please.

emails.subject: Need to cancel May 20 appt
emails.body: Skye - we have to cancel the May 20 appointment, family emergency. Will reschedule next month. Sorry for late notice. -Brian

emails.subject: Possum Patrol website redesign?
emails.body: Hi Skye — I'm a customer (you came out last September) but I'm also a web designer. I noticed your website is a little dated and not mobile-friendly. Would you be open to discussing a refresh? Could even do a trade for service. - Carla

emails.subject: checking on you
emails.body: Skye - just thinking about you and your dad. How's the business going? Need anything? You can call anytime. - Bill

emails.subject: Try our AI receptionist - first 30 days free
emails.body: Hi! WingedHelper is an AI receptionist for service businesses. Answer every customer call, even at 2am. 30-day free trial. Cancel anytime. Sign up: [link]

emails.subject: Dead opossum in pool filter
emails.body: A dead opossum in our pool filter. I can't deal with this. Please help. 444 Whittaker Ridge Hixson. ASAP.

emails.subject: Bees swarming front door
emails.body: Wife and kids can't get in or out of the house. Massive bee swarm hanging from the porch awning. Are these honey bees? Should I call a beekeeper or you? Please advise.

emails.subject: raccoon on kitchen counter
emails.body: There is a raccoon on my kitchen counter eating bananas. I am hiding upstairs. He is fat. Send help. Mrs. Hannigan, 22 Cliffview Dr Lookout Mountain

emails.subject: Bat colony in our HVAC unit
emails.body: Hi, we run an animal hospital in East Ridge. We have a substantial bat colony that has taken up residence in our rooftop HVAC. We need this resolved before our health inspection on June 1. Please call to discuss. (423) 555-0188

emails.subject: snake in the BABY'S ROOM
emails.body: GUYS A SNAKE IS IN MY 8 MONTH OLD'S CRIB. she's in the other room with my wife. We need someone here NOW. I will pay anything. 800 Suck Creek Rd.

emails.subject: Squirrel chewed through ATTIC WIRING
emails.body: We just had an electrician out who says the fire risk in our attic is severe. He says he can't fix it until the squirrels are gone. We have a 4-year-old. How fast can you come, and do you provide a report I can give my insurance?

emails.subject: Roaches found in dough station
emails.body: Skye - it's Lana at Pavlova Bakery. We have roaches in the dough station this morning. We're a monthly account but this is bad. Can you come today before we open?

emails.subject: Possum I think is dying under deck
emails.body: There's a possum under my deck and he looks really bad. Hasn't moved in 12 hours. I don't know if he's dying or playing dead. Can you come check? I don't want my dog to find him.

emails.subject: raccoons fighting in walls 3am
emails.body: It is 3:48 am. There are raccoons FIGHTING in my walls. I can hear teeth. I am crying. Please.

emails.subject: Rodent contamination — production line
emails.body: We have to shut down line 3 due to rodent droppings found near food-grade packaging. We need emergency commercial inspection + treatment + documentation today. Please call Jim Hartwell at extension 211.

emails.subject: Yellow jackets — kid stung
emails.body: My son got stung 4 times by yellow jackets coming out of our shed. We found a huge nest. We need it gone today, we have a birthday party Saturday.

emails.subject: URGENT — bats in resident wing
emails.body: Hi, I'm the director at Brookwood Memory Care. We have bats getting into the residents' wing at night. We are licensed and inspected — this needs to be resolved immediately and discreetly. We have not had to use your services before but you came strongly recommended by Dr. Oyelaya. Please call (423) 555-0192.

emails.subject: chipmunk damage quote
emails.body: Hi - we have chipmunks tearing up our garden and digging under the patio. Quote please for trapping and exclusion. 2 acres in Signal Mountain.

emails.subject: another rental — mouse quote
emails.body: Following up — I have another property in East Brainerd with the same mouse situation. Can you quote a 2-property plan?

emails.subject: Annual church inspection quote
emails.body: Skye, time for our annual inspection. Same building, same scope as last year. Quote please at your earliest convenience. Discount as usual.

emails.subject: RFQ - 220-unit HOA pest control
emails.body: Hello, we are accepting bids from local providers for our 220-unit subdivision in Ooltewah. Current provider is being replaced. Would you be able to submit a proposal? We can send specs if interested.

emails.subject: how much to seal up a chimney from raccoons
emails.body: raccoons in chimney already removed by previous company. need it sealed so they don't come back. quote pls. 4900 Hixson Pike

emails.subject: Estimate request — comprehensive home protection
emails.body: We just moved into a 1940s home in St. Elmo and want a comprehensive inspection + preventive treatment plan. Mice, rats, termites, ants, bats — the works. Can we schedule a walkthrough this week?

emails.subject: Inquiry: monthly inspection
emails.body: Hi - Dr. Oyelaya at Hixson Vet recommended you for our second location in Ringgold. We'd like a quote for monthly inspection comparable to her plan.

emails.subject: home + accounting office combined?
emails.body: Quick question — my home and accounting office are 2 doors apart. Can I get a combined quote for monthly inspection at both? Located in Hill City.

emails.subject: ESTIMATE - rats and exclusion - large home
emails.body: I have a 4500 sq ft home, hearing rats in 2 different walls and the attic. Need full extermination + exclusion work + sanitization. What does that run? My realtor says we need this done before listing in August.

emails.subject: adding our new location
emails.body: Skye — we're opening Lookout Grille on Cherokee Blvd in 6 weeks. Want to add it to our monthly account. Same scope as the main restaurant. Send me a quote when you get a minute. - Tony

emails.subject: price to evict groundhog from garden
emails.body: Have a groundhog destroying my vegetable garden in Sale Creek. He's been there 3 weeks. Quote please. Live trap preferred, I don't want him hurt.

emails.subject: Bed bugs - quote for hostel
emails.body: Hi, we had a confirmed bed bug case in one of our dorm rooms. Need treatment + adjacent room precautions. Can we get a quote and an idea of how many days we'd need to close the affected rooms? - Brandon, GM

emails.subject: Get paid 2x faster
emails.body: Possum Patrol — service businesses using InvoiceAce get paid 2.4x faster on average. Free 14-day trial. Click here to start.

emails.subject: Upgrade your fleet plan and save
emails.body: Small business fleet plans starting at $39/line. Switch from your current carrier and get a $500 statement credit. Limited time.

emails.subject: Your website needs an AI makeover
emails.body: Just analyzed possumpatrol.com — it's scoring 38/100 on modern UX. We can rebuild it with AI in 48 hours for $1,500. Free preview: just reply YES.

emails.subject: Save $1,200+ on commercial solar
emails.body: Local Chattanooga solar installer offering free consults for small business. Our customers save an average of $1,247/yr on energy bills. Reply for details.

emails.subject: Convert 3x more pest control leads
emails.body: We specialize in pest control marketing. 47% of our customers double revenue in 6 months. Free audit available, no commitment. Schedule here.

emails.subject: Your business is eligible for Stripe Capital
emails.body: Based on your account history, Possum Patrol is pre-approved for up to $35,000 in Stripe Capital financing. Click to see your offer.

emails.subject: saw your truck on 153, had to reach out
emails.body: Hey - drove behind your truck on Hwy 153 yesterday. Loved the branding. We help pest control companies like yours generate 30-50 hot leads/month from social. Worth a coffee?

emails.subject: FINAL NOTICE - listing renewal
emails.body: This is your final notice. Your YellowPages business listing will expire June 1, 2026. Renew today for only $89/yr to keep your discoverability.

emails.subject: Ready to sell? Confidential offer
emails.body: Hi Skye, my firm acquires successful family pest control businesses across the Southeast. Discreet, fast, all-cash offers up to 5x EBITDA. Open to a conversation?

emails.subject: Try our scheduling software free
emails.body: Built for field service businesses. Auto-routing, customer notifications, integrated payments. 30-day free trial.

emails.subject: Vector control license renewal notice
emails.body: Possum Patrol Pest Control - your Tennessee Vector Control Operator license expires August 31, 2026. Please submit renewal application and continuing education proof by July 15. Renewal fee: $215.

emails.subject: Re: April invoice
emails.body: Skye - friendly reminder, April invoice ($1,247.50) is now 18 days past due. Marshall always paid by the 10th, just want to make sure it didn't slip through. Let me know if there's anything I can do. - Ron

emails.subject: 2026 Annual Conference Registration
emails.body: TNPCA Annual Conference - Nashville, October 14-16. Continuing education credits available. Early bird pricing ends June 30. Marshall attended every year since 2008.

emails.subject: Your package was delivered
emails.body: Tracking #7724-5589-1023 was delivered to 91 Industrial Way, Soddy-Daisy TN 37379 on May 11 at 4:32pm. Signed for by: B. Carmichael

emails.subject: Renewal: Local Business Spotlight ad
emails.body: Hi Skye, your quarterly Local Business Spotlight ad runs out July 1. Same placement (Sunday lifestyle, B7) is $640/quarter. Let me know.

emails.subject: Following up on policy review
emails.body: Skye, following up - I sent the renewal notice last month. Premium increase is 7% but I have a few ways we might be able to offset it. Free to chat next week? - Tom

emails.subject: Re: Something died in our wall
emails.body: Skye - haven't heard back. The smell is worse. Have you gotten my emails? I called twice and left voicemails.

emails.subject: PTA referral request
emails.body: Hi! I'm with the Hixson Elementary PTA. We're putting together a list of trusted local service businesses for our spring newsletter. Would Possum Patrol like to be included? Free placement, just need a logo and 50-word blurb.

emails.subject: Re: Ants
emails.body: Skye - hi! Still waiting to hear back about the ant treatment. Should I just call?

emails.subject: Another listing
emails.body: Skye - have another pre-listing inspection coming up, this one in St. Elmo. 1800 sqft Craftsman. Owner wants it before May 28. You up for it?

emails.subject: Re: Re: Re: Re: schedule for May
emails.body: Skye, this is my 4th email. We had an appointment scheduled and I've heard nothing. I will need to consider other providers if I don't hear back by Friday. Disappointed - your dad never did this.

emails.subject: Strawberries from the garden
emails.body: Brenda — I mean Skye, dear — strawberries are in if you want some! Stop by anytime. P.S. the possum left on his own, no need to come. - Dottie

emails.subject: PLEASE - bar mitzvah is in 2 weeks
emails.body: Skye - I know you've never responded but I am DESPERATE. Cantor cancelled. My nephew is heartbroken. I'm prepared to offer $3,000 for a 60-minute Possum Patrol set. Please. Just one song? - Garth

emails.subject: the truth about armadillos
emails.body: I have important information about the armadillo population in Hamilton County that the government does not want you to know. Please respond if interested. I have documents.

emails.subject: Re: Raccoons stole my crypto wallet
emails.body: Following up. The raccoons have NOT returned the Ledger. I now believe they may be working with my ex-wife. Please call. This is a federal matter now.

emails.subject: How is your father?
emails.body: Skye — please tell Marshall the squirrels are gone and the eaves are quiet. Tell him I'm thinking of him and Helen, and that I sent prayers. He'd love to hear that. With love, Eleanor
